text:
Check out this work of one of our Firefly Ambassadors on Firefly Boards 

Firefly Boards is a free infinite canvas tool that I helped develop. You get daily free generations with AI models and it's connected with Photoshop and other major industry standard tools.

Ok. So yea, it’s frustrating that we can’t all have access to the best and most powerful models right now.

However, to be fair, I can still do pretty much everything I want to do with the current models… it just takes me a few more prompts than it would with Fable or 5.6.
And then there’s the other side of me that totally agrees with this manifesto:
